0_2.name: Library
0_2.description: You enter a library with tall shelves filled with books. You start digging around to look for clues, and find a page with a bunch of numbers on it.
0_2.fail: There's not much to do here.

0_3.name: Bathroom
0_3.description: You enter a bathroom with a tiled floor and a large tub.
0_3.fail: There's not much to do here.

0_4.name: Strange Hallway
0_4.description: You reach a dead end and knock against the wall. It seems like there's something behind it, but you can't get past.
0_4.new_description: A pile of rubble sits on the ground, as a gaping hole shows a large secret study.
0_4.message: The wall falls down with a crash, revealing a secret study behind it!
0_4.fail: Nothing happens, maybe you need something to help you bring down this wall, like a hammer.

0_5.name: Secret Study
0_5.description: You step over the rubble and enter the study. You rummage through the drawers.
0_5.blockedMessage: A large wall blocks your path.
0_5.fail: You open a book, before getting bored and promptly closing it.

1_2.name: Hallway with Portraits
1_2.description: You walk down a hallway. The walls are lined with large portraits.
1_2.fail: You look around at the portraits.

1_4.name: Study
1_4.description: You enter a study, with a large bookcase behind a wooden desk. It has a very homey feel to it.
1_4.fail: You sit on the chair and swivel in it.

2_0.name: Dim Corridor
2_0.description: You enter a corridor with few candles lighting the walls. You try and look further but only see darkness.
2_0.new_description: You switch on your flashlight, giving you some visibility for the rooms ahead of you.
2_0.fail: You try and look beyond the darkness but can't seem to see anything. Maybe there's something in the mansion you can use.
2_0.message: Your flashlight flickers on, lighting up your path

2_1.name: Ballroom
2_1.description: You enter a massive ballroom with a grand piano lying abandoned on the side.
2_1.fail: You play some notes on the piano, and the room fills with sound just for a moment before it returns to silence.

2_2.name: Empty Hall
2_2.description: You look around a large empty room.
2_2.fail: There's not much to do here.

2_3.name: Dining Room
2_3.description: A grand dining table sits on front of you, a layer of dust sitting on it.
2_3.fail: You swipe some dust off the table and cough.

2_4.name: Pantry
2_4.description: Your stomach grumbles as you enter the Pantry. You look around and end up finding some bread.
2_4.fail: You eat some bread. It's a bit stale but it does the job.

2_5.name: Empty Hallway
2_5.fail: There's not much to do here.

2_6.name: Storage Closet
2_6.description: You rummage around the closet to see if there's anything of use.
2_6.fail: You nearly knock over a mop, and rest it against a wall.

3_0.name: Dark Staircase
3_0.description: You shine your flashlight to reveal a long staircase.
3_0.blockedMessage: A dark passage blocks your way.

3_2.name: Dimly Lit Room
3_2.description: You enter a room lit by only a few candles. You look around and find a flashlight.
3_2.blockedMessage: A door with a number lock blocks your path.
3_2.fail: There's not much to do here.

3_5.name: Living Room
3_5.description: You look around the room full of leather furniture. There doesn't seem to be much to do here except for a locked door
3_5.new_description: You look at the leather furniture, then at the open door, leading you to a short hallway
3_5.message: The door opens with a click, revealing a small passageway.
3_5.fail: You try and open the door with force but it doesn't budge.

4_0.name: Dark Bedroom
4_0.description: You enter a room lit only by your flashlight. It seems to have been a child's bedroom, decorated with bright colors and toys scattered on the floor. You find a pen on the floor and pick it up.
4_0.fail: You notice a large teddy bear in the corner of the room. You want to take it with you, but it's just too big.

4_4.name: Electronics Room
4_4.description: You enter a room filled with electronics: TVs, laptops, and more. You begin to go through the drawers and find a battery.
4_4.fail: You try and switch on the devices but nothing seems to work.

4_5.name: Small Passage
4_5.description: You enter a passage with two doors on either side of you. One of them is locked, with some sort of encrypted code.
4_5.new_description: Light streams through the now open door, leading you to the outside of the mansion.
4_5.blockedMessage: You inspect the door in front of you and notice that you need a key to enter.
4_5.fail: If only you had something to write with to help you crack the code.
4_5.message: You frantically begin to write to try and crack the code. After what seems like forever, you jump to your feet and input the code!

4_6.name: Exit
4_6.description: You walk away from the large mansion you were stuck inside and breathe a sigh of relief.
4_6.blockedMessage: It seems you need to decode a message on a lock to leave.
4_6.fail: There's not much to do here.
